upcoming.title: Pacific Northwest Swimming 2026 PN Spring Showdown, Division 4
upcoming.location: Juanita Aquatic Center, 10601 NE 132nd Street, Kirkland, WA 98034, USA
upcoming.description_html:
This is a swim meet for all the USASwimming member in PNS ( Pacific North Swimming). Total 4 divisions with 41 USASwimming registered teams compete together in 2 days ( 3/28 and 3/29). 

Qualifying Times:

• 50Y events: No qualifying times.

• 100Y and 200Y events: All swimmers must have met the currently posted PNS AGI time standard in USA Swimming sanctioned, approved, or observed competition between December 1, 2024, and the meet entry deadline.

past.title: Dec. Swimming 2025 PN Fall Divisionals, Division 3
past.location: Juanita Aquatic Center, 10601 NE 132nd Street, Kirkland, WA 98034-2824, USA
past.description_html:
Hi Families,

This is also an all level swim meet. It's the great opportunity for expereinced swimmers to meet the time standard, earn the records to qualifiy for the next level swim meet as well as for young swimmers to experience and have fun. 

10&U Swimmers:

  • Each 10&U Pentathlon swimmer may enter up to a maximum of five (5) individual events.
  • The winner of each Pentathlon trophy will be the swimmer with the least amount of accumulated time for the five events.
  • 1st thru 8th for individual events in each awards age group (8, 9, and 10).

11-12 and 13&O Swimmers:

  • Each eligible swimmer may enter up to a maximum of three (3) individual events per day.
  • Ribbons 1st-6th places by gender

past.title: 2025 PN C Pentathlon Invitational
past.location: Hazen High School pool, 1101 Hoquiam Ave NE, Renton, WA 98058, USA
past.description_html:
Hi Families

We will be participating in the meet on Sunday, November 9, hosted by Chinook Aquatic Club at Hazen High School. This is one of the few local meets suitable for swimmers 12 & under.

Please sign up for your events by Wednesday, October 8, or talk with your coach about which events to enter.

Please also read the meet announcement (2025 PN C Pentathlon Invitational) for details.

Thank you!
